name: pccc-consult-web
description: Hệ thống tư vấn Phòng cháy chữa cháy sử dụng AI Chat

scripts.dev:bridge: npm run dev --workspace=bridge/be-bridge && npm run dev --workspace=bridge/ui-bridge
scripts.dev:pccc: npm run dev --workspace=pccc/be-main && npm run dev --workspace=pccc/ui
scripts.start:bridge: npm run start --workspace=bridge/be-bridge && npm run start --workspace=bridge/ui-bridge
scripts.start:pccc: npm run start --workspace=pccc/be-main && npm run start --workspace=pccc/ui
